title: selaginella eschscholzii
intro: Selaginella eschscholzii, also known as Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen plant in the Selaginellaceae family. It is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Selaginella eschscholzii is often prepared as a tea or infused into oils and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
